C[Ukasuhs: In many of my other games (around the time this game started) the openings were so similar, so i appologize that you were the victim of this strnge opening
C[Ukasuhs: Here, approaching from q15 makes it easier to settle on the side and make o10's position be strange
C[Ukasuhs: It's important to defend here. either connect or descend
C[Ukasuhs: sliding to c2 is actually better here to avoid getting overconcentrated
C[Ukasuhs: c18 is the only choice really. the corner as well as the strength of black's group are very important
C[Ukasuhs: pushing in at j17 is better here to hurt black's shape
C[Ukasuhs: after this it's hard to see where white is going to make enough points. Black has no weaknesses
C[Ukasuhs: This fight is a good idea to try to take some points from black, but black is too far ahead already.

C[grobblewobble: I had to look this up in the joseki library to comment. It appears that the normal black move here is E18.
C[grobblewobble: The urgent thing to do now is try to save the two black cutting stones at E16. If white can swallow them, that makes the black E14 group weak
C[grobblewobble: The black D15 group is in danger now.
C[grobblewobble: Understandable move and maybe for the best, even though it hurts to give up the important cutting stones.
C[grobblewobble: C9 is extremely big for both, but black has no time to play there.
C[grobblewobble: H12 is probably better, because of the white cut at F13.
C[grobblewobble: I think it is better to play on the outside, like Q7.
C[grobblewobble: A mistake, L15 is much better.
GN[Super Serious Tournament for Super Strong Serious Players Only!!!w]
C[grobblewobble: This move looks a little early to me, idk. Maybe pincer the lone black stone at the top (F17) and work from there?

C[grobblewobble: This joseki is supposed to end in sente for white. For example, you could play tenuki instead of D7. There are also other variants, but I don't know them well enough - just make sure you don't end in gote.
C[grobblewobble: I think I would push up with O4 and try to create more aji in the black corner.
C[grobblewobble: This is docile. M4 is better.
C[grobblewobble: Maybe white needs to try something like this in order not to fall behind, but it is dangerous to start an invasion here while the white group to the right is still weak.
C[grobblewobble: A difficult situation, I am not able to read it out. However, my gut feeling is that M16 is better. The atari at L15 is good for black.
grobblewobble: Maybe even stretch, play L15 yourself. If black M16, play N15 and squeeze.
C[grobblewobble: This is not enough to live unconditionally and brings the stones to the right in danger, but it is hard to say what else you should do now.
C[grobblewobble: Erasing the ko with N19 is urgent.
C[grobblewobble: This allows me to kill the group with R9. I think white can live with S9 instead.
C[grobblewobble: P18 is better, but the game is over in any case. I can execute a big ko threat and white still needs another move to the right to live. Thanks for the game.
